news.summary: Five One Labs in ERBIL, Iraq, is collaborating with the International Organization for Migration to empower entrepreneurs. They recently conducted a two-day workshop in Sulaimani on January 31. The workshop aimed to equip Iraqi female entrepreneurs with skills to integrate climate resilience, peacebuilding, and eco-friendly practices into their businesses. This initiative underscores the commitment to fostering diverse talent and supporting women in entrepreneurship.
news.headline: Five One Labs partners with IOM for workshop in Iraq to empower female entrepreneurs on climate resilience, peacebuilding. Workshop held in Sulaimani on Jan 31.

news.summary: In April 9, 2025, JOY GROUP (Shanghai Juyi Cosmetics Co., Ltd.) disclosed their financial performance for the fiscal year 2024. The company reported total sales surpassing US$580 million (equivalent to RMB 4.2 billion) with annual revenue hitting US$483 million (about RMB 3.5 billion). This marked an impressive 36% increase compared to the previous year.
news.headline: JOY GROUP revenue grows 36% to US$483M in 2024, total sales exceed US$580M (RMB 4.2B) from multi beauty categories.

news.summary: FirstLight, a prominent provider of digital infrastructure services in the Northeast and mid-Atlantic regions, has unveiled new features and an improved customer experience. The company, based in Albany, N.Y., made the announcement on April 9, 2025. This development signifies a major step towards enhancing their services for enterprise and carrier clients. The initiative aims to provide advanced unified communications features, ultimately augmenting the overall quality of service for customers. Such improvements are set to significantly impact the customer experience.
news.headline: FirstLight announced the launch of advanced UC features and enhanced customer experience; a provider of digital infrastructure services.

news.summary: Leading provider of business intelligence and market analysis, Verified Market Research®, excitedly unveils its comprehensive report on the Quantum Networking Market. The report discusses the growing concerns over data security and the surge in investments in quantum technology. It provides an authoritative analysis of the market, which is projected to reach a market size of approximately $1.5 billion by 2028. This analysis aims to assist businesses in making informed decisions and understanding the evolving landscape of the Quantum Networking Market.
news.headline: Quantum Networking Market to reach $16.9B by 2032 at 25.2% CAGR: Verified Market Research®. Rising data security concerns driving investments.

news.summary: The latest 2025 Testing in DevOps Report from mabl indicates a growing trend towards increased utilization of AI in testing and development processes. Released in Boston on April 9, 2025, by mabl, the prominent AI-driven test automation platform, this 6th edition report highlights a surge in AI adoption for various testing and development purposes.
news.headline: mabl's report forecasts increased AI adoption in testing by 2025, highlighting trends in development.

news.summary: CarMax (NYSE: KMX) will be reporting its quarterly earnings on Thursday, 2025-04-10. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.66 for the company. In the previous quarter, CarMax exceeded expectations with an EPS beat of $0.20, leading to a 0.05% increase in share price the next day. Over the past quarters, EPS estimates and actuals have varied, impacting stock prices. As of April 08, CarMax's shares were trading at $73.31, with a 2.82% increase in the last 52 weeks. Analysts recommend an Outperform rating for CarMax, with an average one-year price target of $92.75. Investors should focus not only on earnings beat or miss but also on the company's guidance for future growth.
news.headline: CarMax (KMX) to release earnings on 2025-04-10 with estimated EPS of $0.66. Past EPS beats led to price increases. Stock currently at $73.31, up 2.82% in 52 weeks. Outperform rating with $92.75 price target.

news.summary: The Seed Oil Safe program has significantly increased its product options by adding eight new brands, resulting in a total of over 1.5 million app users having access to a wider range of cleaner and healthier products. These offerings are devoid of inflammatory seed oils and ultra-processed additives. The expansion took place in Austin, Texas, with the announcement made on April 9, 2025, through PRNewswire.
news.headline: Seed Oil Safe® program expands with 8 new brands, now offering 1.5M+ users cleaner products, free of seed oils.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of April 9, 2025, it has been projected that the Battery Energy Storage System market in the United States will grow to a value of USD 7.02 billion by 2029, significantly rising from USD 2.13 billion in 2024. This substantial increase reflects a compound annual growth rate of 26.8% between 2024 and 2029. The insights were gathered from a recent study conducted by MarketsandMarkets™. The surge in demand for...
news.headline: US Battery Energy Storage System market to reach $7.02 billion by 2029 from $2.13 billion in 2024, growing at 26.8% CAGR.

news.summary: Lovesac (NASDAQ: LOVE) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on April 10, 2025, with analysts estimating an EPS of $1.85. The market is eagerly awaiting the release in hopes of exceeding estimates and providing positive guidance for the next quarter, as guidance can impact stock prices. In the previous quarter, Lovesac missed EPS by $0.04, resulting in a 2.33% increase in share price the following day. The company's historical earnings performance showcases fluctuations in EPS estimates and actuals, impacting price changes. As of April 8, Lovesac shares were trading at $12.47, with a 52-week decline of 40.76%, leading to bearish outlooks from long-term shareholders. Analysts have a consensus rating of Buy for Lovesac. Investors should consider these factors before the earnings release.
news.headline: Lovesac (LOVE) to announce Q1 earnings with EPS estimated at $1.85; past price change data and market performance included.

news.summary: In Worcester, Massachusetts on April 9, 2025, The Hanover Insurance Group, Inc. (NYSE: THG), a prominent national insurance company catering to individuals, families, and businesses, disclosed a partnership with Hagerty (HGTY) to offer tailored insurance coverage for classic cars. This collaboration aims to provide specialized insurance solutions for classic car owners.
news.headline: The Hanover partners with Hagerty to offer specialized insurance for classic cars, combining resources for better coverage.

news.summary: CureVac (NASDAQ: CVAC) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Thursday, April 10, 2025. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $-0.09 for the company. Investors are anticipating the announcement, with hopes of the company exceeding expectations and providing optimistic guidance for the upcoming quarter. Stay updated for more details on this story.
news.headline: CureVac (NASDAQ: CVAC) to report quarterly earnings on April 10, 2025. Estimated EPS is $-0.09. Investors hopeful for positive news.

news.summary: HGreg INFINITI Laval in Montréal has been recognized as the top INFINITI retailer in Canada for 2024, achieving the highest sales volume in the country with close to 450 units sold. Philippe Venne, the Managing Director of HGreg INFINITI Laval, expressed pride in his team for their hard work, stating, "I am very proud of the work done by my team this year." He credited their dedication for once again leading the Canadian rankings. Venne extended his gratitude to the team and loyal customers for their support.
news.headline: HGreg INFINITI Laval named top INFINITI retailer in Canada for 2024 with nearly 450 units sold, thanks team and loyal clientele.

news.summary: EPAM Systems, Inc., a prominent company specializing in digital transformation services and product engineering, was recently awarded for its achievement in creating an AI-powered solution used for geospatial data visualization and insights. The accolade was received on April 9, 2025, in Newtown, Pennsylvania. EPAM Systems, Inc. specifically recognized for this innovation, is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol EPAM.
news.headline: EPAM wins 2025 Google Cloud Industry Solutions Partner of the Year Award for Oil and Gas with AI-powered system.

news.summary: Northern Technologies (NASDAQ: NTIC) is set to unveil its quarterly earnings on Thursday, April 10, 2025. Analysts are projecting that the company will report an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.06. Investors are eagerly awaiting this update, hoping for results that exceed expectations and positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Northern Technologies (NASDAQ: NTIC) to announce quarterly earnings on 2025-04-10. Expectations for EPS of $0.06. Investors seek positive guidance.

news.summary: Bank7 (NASDAQ: BSVN) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on Thursday, April 10, 2025. Analysts predict the bank will report an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.95. Investors are eagerly awaiting the announcement, anticipating that Bank7 will exceed expectations and provide optimistic guidance for the upcoming quarter. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bank7 (BSVN) to release earnings, estimated EPS $0.95. Investors awaiting surpassing estimates & positive guidance.

news.summary: A Columbus, Ohio shopping center has seen significant growth in its retail, dining, and entertainment offerings as First National Realty Partners (FNRP), a prominent national private equity commercial real estate firm, has achieved a 99% occupancy rate at Carriage Place Shopping Center as of April 9, 2025. The development demonstrates an expansion in amenities and options available to visitors and shoppers in the area.
news.headline: FNRP achieves 99% occupancy at Carriage Place Shopping Center in Columbus, OH, expanding retail options.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, in Los Angeles, 18 Grey Games, a game developer and publisher owned by Black individuals, has unveiled the global launch of Cuties Candy Quest. This match-three puzzle game introduces the Cutie Puffs universe, a brand that commemorates diversity, togetherness, and enjoyment.
news.headline: Cuties Candy Quest, a new match-three puzzle game by 18 Grey Games, celebrates world culture, unity, and fun.

news.summary: Byrna Technologies, listed on NASDAQ as BYRN, is prepared to reveal its quarterly earnings on Thursday, April 10, 2025. Analysts predict that the company will announce an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.01. Investors are eagerly anticipating the news, optimistic that Byrna Technologies may exceed these expectations and offer positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. Stay tuned for further updates on this developing story.
news.headline: Byrna Technologies (NASDAQ: BYRN) set to announce quarterly earnings soon. Analysts predict EPS of $0.01. Investors hopeful for positive news.

news.summary: An initial payment of $2.5 million has been made, with the potential for total earnings reaching roughly $8.5 million if all warrants are fully exercised.
news.headline: American Rebel closing $11 million private placement on Nasdaq rules. $2.5M upfront with potential $8.5M from warrants.

news.summary: In Cincinnati, Febreze introduces its fourth annual Scent of the Year, Vanilla Suede, encouraging a shift from FOMO to JOMO. This scent from the new Blends Collection offers a luxurious experience with a blend of brushed mahogany, gold amber, and smoked vanilla. It aims to create a sanctuary for those at home, appealing to both homebodies and hostesses. Embrace the joy of missing out and enjoy the comfort of your own space with Vanilla Suede, turning any night into a luxurious staycation.
news.headline: Febreze chooses Vanilla Suede as its 2025 Scent of the Year, offering a luxurious staycation experience with a blend of brushed mahogany, gold amber, and smoked vanilla.

news.summary: A popular fast-food chain, Jack in the Box Inc. (NASDAQ: JACK), has introduced a new Nashville Hot menu featuring Nashville Hot Popcorn Chicken and Nashville Hot Mozzarella Sticks at all locations across the country. The move comes in response to the growing trend of Southern-style spicy flavors. The new offerings aim to provide a balance of bold, craveable taste while tapping into the increasing demand for fiery options. Customers can now enjoy these innovative additions on the menu.
news.headline: Jack in the Box introduces new Nashville Hot menu with Nashville Hot Popcorn Chicken and Mozzarella Sticks, available nationwide.

news.summary: Victory Foods has introduced the largest hemp heart protein and oil processing line in the United States, located in Carrollton, Kentucky. This launch aims to address the increasing demand for their allergen-free and nutrient-rich ingredients.
news.headline: Victory Foods launches largest hemp heart protein & oil processing line in North America to meet demand for allergen-free ingredients.

news.summary: Toronto's Park Hyatt is celebrating spring from April 12 to June 1 with a mix of art, culture, and Japanese flavors, focusing on the timeless Sakura essence. The hotel offers a variety of experiences for guests and locals to enjoy the season's beauty, including carefully crafted menus. This event aims to provide tranquility and cultural enrichment at one of Toronto's iconic hotels.
news.headline: Park Hyatt Toronto celebrates Sakura season from April 12 to June 1 with cultural experiences and Japanese flavors.
Gold investment opportunities explained: from ETFs to jewelry, learn how to invest in this precious metal.

news.summary: Bentley Systems has announced a partnership with Google aimed at enhancing infrastructure by leveraging asset analytics. This collaboration is set to bring cutting-edge technology and expertise to improve infrastructure systems. This joint effort is expected to drive innovation and efficiency in the industry, benefiting a wide range of projects. The partnership marks a significant step towards advancing asset management practices and is anticipated to have a notable impact on infrastructure development.
news.headline: Bentley Systems and Google collaborate to enhance infrastructure with asset analytics at Las Vegas.

news.summary: In Boston today, Atlassian revealed that Tempo has secured the prestigious title of Atlassian Partner of the Year 2024-2025 in the Enterprise Apps section. This acknowledgment celebrates Tempo's outstanding efforts in supporting Atlassian clients in 2024, highlighting their creativity, proficiency, and commitment to providing impactful solutions. Chosen from a worldwide pool of partners, Tempo stood out for its capacity to generate significant customer results and introduce pioneering initiatives.
news.headline: Tempo wins Atlassian Partner of the Year 2024-2025 in Enterprise Apps, recognized for innovation and customer success.

news.summary: HopSkipDrive has introduced a groundbreaking AI-driven transportation planning platform in Los Angeles. The new platform, part of RouteWise AI™ software, offers unprecedented capabilities for school districts looking to improve safety and efficiency. By leveraging artificial intelligence, it assesses numerous scenarios and national benchmarks, analyzing thousands of possibilities to anticipate and mitigate potential delays. This innovation marks a significant step forward in transportation planning, providing invaluable insights for school districts aiming to optimize their operations.
news.headline: HopSkipDrive introduces AI-driven school transportation dashboard for improved efficiency; offers unlimited scenarios and national benchmarks.

news.summary: Alicia Joseph has been appointed as the Global Vice President of Marketing at LeadsOnline, a company based in Plano, Texas. The appointment signifies a strategic move by the company to enhance its marketing efforts. Joseph will be responsible for overseeing marketing operations on a global scale. This development underlines LeadsOnline's commitment to strengthening its marketing strategies under Joseph's leadership.
news.headline: LeadsOnline names Alicia Joseph Global VP of Marketing in Plano, Texas.

news.summary: A behavioral health organization based in Overland Park, Kansas, Hazelden Betty Ford, has recently opted for the Netsmart CareFabric Platform. This decision aims to improve their services with the help of artificial intelligence, telehealth, and automation for collections. This change demonstrates their commitment to leveraging technology for the betterment of their behavioral health services.
news.headline: Hazelden Betty Ford Foundation teams up with Netsmart for better behavioral healthcare using AI and CareFabric® Platform.

news.summary: Huron, a global professional services firm trading under NASDAQ symbol HURN, has recently received certification from Great Place To Work® in several countries. For the first time, the firm has been recognized in the United States, Canada, India, Singapore, and the United Kingdom. This achievement signifies Huron's dedication to fostering a supportive, diverse, and productive environment that prioritizes the well-being, growth, and satisfaction of its employees. Notably, 90% of Huron's worldwide staff contributed to this recognition.
news.headline: Huron achieves Great Place To Work® certification in multiple countries, prioritizing employee well-being and satisfaction.

news.summary: In Miami, The Hackett Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: HCKT) shared results from its 2025 Key Issues Study, indicating that 89% of executives are now progressing in their Gen AI initiatives, a substantial increase from 16% in the previous year. The study highlights the shift of Gen AI from a phase of exploration to one of acceleration. It also notes that finance leaders will play a key role in driving transformation, with 65% of them expected to take on leadership roles in this process.
news.headline: Finance leaders facing increased pressure as 89% now advancing Gen AI, up from 16% last year, per Hackett study.

news.summary: A provider of modern ledger and cards infrastructure, Episode Six (E6), is expanding its presence in Canada in collaboration with Yoo Financial, a Canadian financial institution holding a significant issuing and acquiring license with Mastercard. The partnership aims to introduce a variety of new credit card options to the Canadian market. This move comes as Canadian consumers seek customized financial solutions that offer individualized benefits.
news.headline: Yoo Financial teams up with Episode Six to introduce credit cards in Canada, catering to demand for personalized financial products.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Q2 Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: QTWO) revealed that Signature Bank has initiated Q2’s Digital Banking Platform to boost its digital banking shift. This move aims to speed up Signature Bank's digital banking transition by providing advanced digital banking services to its commercial and retail clientele. Signature Bank, founded in 2006 and headquartered in Illinois, is experiencing rapid growth as an independently owned commercial bank.
news.headline: Signature Bank partners with Q2 for digital banking, providing products for commercial and retail customers.

news.summary: Aqara, based in New York, has revealed a major development in the integration of the Matter standard across its ecosystem.
news.headline: Aqara improves user experience with increased Matter device integration and advanced bridging capabilities.

news.summary: In Hannover, Germany, the world's leading trade fair for industrial technology took place at the Hannover Exhibition and Trade Center from March 31 to April 4, 2025. With the theme "Energizing a Sustainable Industry," the event drew in almost 127,000 attendees.
news.headline: SUPCON showcased AI-powered automation solutions at Hannover Messe 2025 with nearly 127,000 attendees.

news.summary: A fresh animated video was launched by the Los Angeles nonprofit Climate Resolve in partnership with science educator Bill Nye, emphasizing the potential of cool surfaces as an effective strategy against climate change. The video showcases the advantages of implementing cool surfaces like reflective roofs, walls, and pavements in addressing the Earth's energy imbalance and addressing global warming. The campaign aims to raise awareness about the importance of utilizing these surfaces on a global scale for climate mitigation efforts.
news.headline: Climate Resolve and Bill Nye partner to share video on cool surfaces' role in fighting climate change, emphasizing benefits.

news.summary: Last year, a report from SCOTTSBORO, Ala. revealed insights into consumer behavior and contents found in lost luggage. Unclaimed Baggage, the sole retailer of lost luggage in the nation, shared that a remarkable number of items were found in lost bags. The study discovered that passengers had left behind a wide range of items, from electronics to clothing and accessories. These lost items reflect the busy lifestyles of travelers, with over 10,000 electronic gadgets and 5,000 clothing pieces left unclaimed. The report highlights the common trend of forgetting personal belongings during travel and offers a peek into the various items that passengers carry in their bags.
news.headline: Unclaimed Baggage releases report on contents of lost luggage in 2024, revealing consumer behavior and top items found.

news.summary: Louisville, Kentucky - On April 9, 2025, Churchill Downs Racetrack in Louisville revealed its collaboration with a renowned chef and New York Times best-selling cookbook author for the "Kentucky Derby At-Home" menu. The menu features modern race day bites tailored for effortless and sophisticated entertaining. The partnership promises to elevate the experience for at-home spectators and enhance the traditional Derby festivities.
news.headline: Chef Joshua Weissman partners with The Kentucky Derby for at-home celebrations with modern race day menu.

news.summary: A popular annual event, Black Tech Week, revealed that the renowned artist Keke Palmer will be the keynote speaker at the upcoming 2025 conference in Cincinnati, Ohio, scheduled from July 14 to July 16. Palmer, known for her success in acting, singing, and entrepreneurship, will grace the event with her presence.
news.headline: Actress Keke Palmer to keynote Black Tech Week 2025 in Cincinnati on July 14-16. Exciting event for tech enthusiasts.

news.summary: Auxilium Health, based in Cleveland, made public the completion of an oversubscribed pre-seed funding round, raising $1.5 million, surpassing their initial goal of $1.2 million. The investment was spearheaded by local investors and influencers dedicated to fostering innovation and economic development in the region.
news.headline: Auxilium Health closes $1.5M funding round, surpassing $1.2M target, secures $275K grant from NSF. Innovation & growth focused.

news.summary: Famous culinary personalities such as Emeril Lagasse, Gail Simmons, Kwame Onwuachi, Tyler Florence, Maneet Chauhan, Andrew Zimmern, Claudette Zepeda, Rodney Scott, Carrie Morey, Melissa King, Julia Coney, Mike Lata, Hector Garate, Wanda Mann, and others are set to be the main attractions at this year's upcoming event. Tickets for the event will be available for consumers starting May 15th.
news.headline: Food & Wine Classic in Charleston returns in November with top culinary talents - Emiril Lagasse, Gail Simmons, Kwame Onwuachi, Tyler Florence and more. Tickets on sale May 15.

news.summary: Seeking medical help may be necessary even if a pet is poisoned at home. In Minneapolis on April 9, 2025, pet owners were reminded of the risks associated with pets consuming harmful substances. It is common for pets to ingest items inadvertently, a situation that often warrants immediate intervention. It is crucial to remember that poisoning incidents can lead to serious health concerns for pets, necessitating prompt medical attention. Owners should be vigilant and take appropriate action to protect their pets' well-being.
news.headline: Emergency vet visits due to pet poisoning are common, caution needed. Prompt response crucial. #PetSafety

news.summary: A major event in car design is set for 2025 in Munich, showcasing new models, concept vehicles, and technology presentations. Over 70 international journalists are anticipated to participate in the three-day program. The event will bring together automotive design executives and industry professionals for discussions and displays of cutting-edge design and innovation.
news.headline: Auto executives to discuss design trends at Car Design Event 2025 in Munich. 70 journalists expected. New models and concepts to be unveiled.

news.summary: In honor of International Firefighters' Day, individuals can nominate a firefighter, EMT, or paramedic to receive complimentary LASIK surgery. This initiative aims to show appreciation for those who selflessly protect communities. The offer is available in Tallahassee, Florida, starting from April 9, 2025. The beneficiary of the free LASIK surgery will be selected from nominations provided by the public. This gesture serves as a token of gratitude for the dedication and service of these brave individuals.
news.headline: Eye Associates of North Florida is offering free LASIK to first responders on International Firefighters' Day.

news.summary: eBay Ventures, the venture capital division of eBay, has granted a $300,000 investment to American company Refiberd, naming them as eBay's Circular Fashion Innovator of the Year. By 2025, eBay aims to provide a total global investment of $1.2 million to various fashion innovators and small businesses.
news.headline: eBay invests $300k in Refiberd for circular fashion solutions, plans $1.2M investment by 2025.

news.summary: A significant development has taken place in Oakland as Boldyn Networks (Boldyn), a top provider of shared network infrastructure globally, has successfully expanded its fiber connectivity in the area. This move, finalized on April 9, 2025, will greatly enhance connectivity in Oakland and set the stage for accommodating the increasing demands of AI technology. The expansion of fiber optics by Boldyn will play a crucial role in supercharging the connectivity of the region, revolutionizing the way data is transmitted and accessed. This step marks a pivotal moment in enhancing digital infrastructure and supporting the growth of AI-driven applications.
news.headline: Boldyn Networks expands fiber into Oakland, lighting up 80 miles for enhanced connectivity, preparing for AI-driven demands.

news.summary: A new era is on the horizon for NGLmitú's Hispanic Kitchen, the premier destination for more than 1.2 million enthusiasts of Latino cuisine. With a fresh creative outlook and a mission to shape the digital discourse on Latino culinary traditions, the platform is ready to embark on a new chapter in its journey. Los Angeles, April 9, 2025.
news.headline: NGLmitú's Hispanic Kitchen rebrands to target Latino food lovers, aiming to lead in digital space.

news.summary: In San Ramon, California on April 9, 2025, Lumin Digital, a prominent provider of cloud-native digital banking services, revealed its recent partnership with Advanced Fraud Solutions (AFS), a reputable expert in fraud prevention solutions. This collaboration aims to introduce cutting-edge Positive...
news.headline: Lumin Digital teams up with AFS for Positive Pay Integration to boost business banking security on April 9, 2025.

news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia, on April 9, 2025, the Special Competitive Studies Project (SCSP) revealed the involvement of new and returning sponsors for their upcoming second AI+ Expo. The SCSP is a non-partisan, non-profit initiative focused on enhancing America's enduring competitiveness in artificial intelligence (AI). This expo aims to showcase advancements in AI technologies and strategies. Stay tuned for further updates on this event.
news.headline: SCSP's AI+ Expo gains sponsors including Lockheed Martin, Qualcomm, Booz Allen Hamilton, and Domino Data Lab in Arlington, VA on April 9, 2025.

news.summary: AUO Display Plus leads the way in revolutionizing AI applications and services alongside ecosystem partners, striving for complete digital transformation and enhanced user experience through seamless collaboration. Through this initiative, the company envisions maximizing user satisfaction while staying at the forefront of innovation in the industry.
news.headline: AUO Display Plus partners in AI innovations for retail, enterprise, and healthcare, aiming for digital transformation.
